title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in NoSQL databases across Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. The session covered product releases, architectural innovations, and customer stories designed to support AI and modern application workloads.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session surveys recent developments across three managed NoSQL services: Memorystore for in-memory caching, Firestore, and the Bigtable wide-column store. It covers product releases, architectural changes, and customer stories framed around supporting AI and modern application workloads, including vector database capabilities. The takeaway is a consolidated view of how the three offerings are positioned for these use cases.
